title: 广东城市 GDP 排位赛
summary: 对比广东 21 个地级市在不同年份的地区生产总值变化。
summaryEn: Compare GDP changes across Guangdong’s 21 prefecture-level cities over time.
sourceLabel: 广东省统计局 / 国家统计局等 · 1978-2025
sourceLabelEn: Guangdong Statistics Bureau / NBS China and others · 1978-2025

events.title: 改革开放拉开序幕
events.description: 广东随后成为对外开放最重要的试验场之一，珠三角城市的增长曲线开始改变。
events.descriptionEn: Guangdong soon became one of the main testing grounds for opening up, changing the growth path of Pearl River Delta cities.

events.title: 深圳、珠海、汕头设立经济特区
events.titleEn: Shenzhen, Zhuhai, and Shantou become SEZs
events.description: 广东三大经济特区成为改革开放前沿，早期增长先从这些沿海节点展开。
events.descriptionEn: Guangdong’s three special economic zones became the front line of reform, with early growth starting from these coastal nodes.

events.title: 汕头经济特区起步
events.description: 汕头依托侨乡和港口基础进入特区序列，是广东早期开窗口城市之一。
events.descriptionEn: Shantou entered the SEZ group on the strength of its overseas-Chinese networks and port base.

events.title: 深圳经济特区起步
events.description: 深圳从边陲县城进入特区时代，之后成为广东城市排位变化的最大变量。
events.descriptionEn: Shenzhen entered the special-zone era from a border county town and later became the biggest variable in Guangdong’s city ranking.

events.title: 珠海经济特区起步
events.description: 珠海借毗邻澳门的区位进入开放窗口，经济规模从很小的基数开始抬升。
events.descriptionEn: Zhuhai used its location next to Macao as an opening-up window, growing from a very small economic base.

events.title: 东莞升格为地级市
events.description: 东莞从县级市升格，城市治理和招商承载能力增强，后来承接外向型制造的空间更完整。
events.descriptionEn: Dongguan was upgraded from a county-level city, giving it stronger governance and investment capacity for export manufacturing.

events.title: 深交所开始营业
events.description: 资本市场在深圳落地，让这座城市不只是制造和口岸，也开始形成金融和创新企业融资能力。
events.descriptionEn: The stock exchange gave Shenzhen a capital-market role beyond manufacturing and border trade, strengthening finance and innovation funding.

events.title: 南方谈话后珠三角加速
events.titleEn: Pearl River Delta accelerates after the Southern Tour
events.description: 市场化和外向型制造继续加速，广州、深圳、佛山、东莞的差距开始被重新拉开。
events.descriptionEn: Market reform and export manufacturing accelerated, reshaping the gaps among Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Foshan, and Dongguan.

events.title: 汕头遭遇骗税案冲击
events.titleEn: Shantou is hit by the tax-fraud crackdown
events.description: 出口骗税整治改变了当地外贸信用和营商环境，汕头后来的增长斜率明显弱于深圳、珠海。
events.descriptionEn: The export tax-fraud crackdown affected local trade credibility and the business environment; Shantou’s later growth slope lagged Shenzhen and Zhuhai.

events.title: 中国加入 WTO
events.description: 外向型制造和全球供应链加速扩张，珠三角城市的增长逻辑进入新阶段。
events.descriptionEn: Export manufacturing and global supply chains accelerated, pushing Pearl River Delta cities into a new growth phase.

events.title: “大佛山”五区格局确立
events.titleEn: Greater Foshan forms its five-district structure
events.description: 南海、顺德、三水、高明撤市设区后，佛山制造业和民营经济被放进一个更完整的城市框架。
events.descriptionEn: After Nanhai, Shunde, Sanshui, and Gaoming became districts, Foshan’s manufacturing base sat inside a more integrated city structure.

events.title: 大亚湾石化基地成形
events.titleEn: Daya Bay petrochemical base takes shape
events.description: 中海壳牌在惠州大亚湾投产，石化链条成为惠州后来进入省内前列的重要支撑。
events.descriptionEn: CNOOC Shell began operations in Huizhou’s Daya Bay, making petrochemicals a major support for Huizhou’s later rise.

events.title: 全球金融危机冲击珠三角
events.titleEn: Global financial crisis hits the PRD
events.description: 外需骤降重创广东出口导向型经济，东莞、深圳、佛山等城市被迫从低端制造向结构升级加速转型。
events.descriptionEn: Plunging external demand hits Guangdong's export economy; Dongguan, Shenzhen, Foshan accelerate the shift from low-end manufacturing to industrial upgrading.

events.title: 横琴开发上升为国家战略
events.titleEn: Hengqin development becomes a national strategy
events.description: 横琴被纳入珠海经济特区范围，珠海的增长叙事从单一特区转向粤澳合作平台。
events.descriptionEn: Hengqin was brought into the Zhuhai SEZ, shifting Zhuhai’s growth story toward a Guangdong-Macao cooperation platform.

events.title: 广佛同城化框架协议签署
events.description: 广佛地铁同年动工，佛山城市能级被实质性拉高。
events.descriptionEn: The first cross-city metro line breaks ground, lifting Foshan's urban capacity.

events.title: 广深双核心拉开距离
events.titleEn: Guangzhou and Shenzhen set the pace
events.description: 广州和深圳明显领先，珠三角的城市梯队在十年前后已经成型。
events.descriptionEn: Guangzhou and Shenzhen are already clearly ahead, with the Pearl River Delta hierarchy taking shape.

events.title: 深圳经济特区范围扩大到全市
events.description: 特区版图从原关内四区扩至全市，关内关外二元体制终结，深圳的产业空间和城市承载力大幅释放。
events.descriptionEn: The SEZ boundary expands from the original four districts citywide, freeing up industrial space and urban capacity.

events.title: 南沙新区获国家级定位
events.description: 南沙新区规划获批，广州在传统中心城区之外获得面向粤港澳合作和先进制造的新增长空间。
events.descriptionEn: The Nansha plan gave Guangzhou a new growth space for Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao cooperation and advanced manufacturing beyond the old core.

events.title: 广东自贸试验区落地
events.titleEn: Guangdong Pilot Free Trade Zone lands
events.description: 南沙、前海蛇口、横琴被放进同一开放试验框架，广深珠的制度红利重新叠加。
events.descriptionEn: Nansha, Qianhai-Shekou, and Hengqin entered one opening-up framework, reconnecting Guangzhou, Shenzhen, and Zhuhai through institutional reform.

events.title: 深圳升至省内第一
events.description: 科技、金融和先进制造叠加，深圳在总量上超过广州，省内首位发生变化。
events.descriptionEn: Technology, finance, and advanced manufacturing push Shenzhen past Guangzhou in total GDP.

events.title: 深圳GDP超越香港
events.description: 深圳经济总量首次超过香港，标志性差距转换完成。
events.descriptionEn: Shenzhen's total GDP exceeds Hong Kong's for the first time, a symbolic milestone.

events.title: 港珠澳大桥通车
events.description: 珠海成为唯一与港澳陆路相连的城市，港珠澳一小时生活圈形成，珠海的城市区位和开放格局被重新定义。
events.descriptionEn: Zhuhai becomes the only city with direct road links to both Hong Kong and Macao, redefining its position in the region.

events.title: 粤港澳大湾区规划发布
events.titleEn: Greater Bay Area plan is released
events.description: 城市竞争开始更多放在湾区协同里观察，广深佛莞和珠海、中山、惠州的关系更加紧密。
events.descriptionEn: City competition is increasingly viewed through Bay Area coordination, tightening links among Guangzhou, Shenzhen, Foshan, Dongguan, Zhuhai, Zhongshan, and Huizhou.

events.title: 巴斯夫湛江一体化基地启动
events.description: 广东最大外资项目落地，湛江石化产业进入新量级。
events.descriptionEn: Guangdong's largest foreign investment lands, boosting Zhanjiang's petrochemical sector.

events.title: 东莞进入万亿城市行列
events.description: 制造业城市东莞突破万亿，广东的第二梯队不再只是佛山一个重心。
events.descriptionEn: Manufacturing-heavy Dongguan passes the trillion-yuan mark, broadening Guangdong’s second tier.

events.title: 惠州稳居全省第五
events.description: 石化与电子信息双轮驱动，惠州在广深佛莞之后形成稳固的第二梯队头部。
events.descriptionEn: Driven by petrochemicals and electronics, Huizhou solidifies its place behind the top four.

events.title: 佛山守住制造业第三极
events.description: 佛山依靠制造业和民营经济保持前列，和东莞、惠州形成更紧的追赶带。
events.descriptionEn: Foshan stays near the top through manufacturing and private enterprise, with Dongguan and Huizhou close behind.

events.title: 深中通道通车
events.description: 深圳至中山车程从2小时缩至30分钟，珠江西岸城市区位被根本改变，中山、江门的增长预期显著抬升。
events.descriptionEn: Travel time from Shenzhen to Zhongshan drops from 2 hours to 30 minutes, fundamentally reshaping the geography and growth outlook for western PRD cities.

events.title: 深圳接近四万亿
events.description: 最新年度数据里，深圳继续扩大总量优势，广深之间的距离更清楚。
events.descriptionEn: In the latest annual data, Shenzhen extends its lead and the gap with Guangzhou becomes clearer.

sourceNote: 1978-2005 年早期帧主要使用国家统计局《中国城市统计年鉴》珠江三角洲经济区主要城市表；该表不覆盖全部 21 个地级市，部分非珠三角城市从 2010 年广东省统计局分市年度数据开始进入。汕头早期点位补充自广东省统计局经济特区 40 周年材料、汕头市统计局 2005 年统计公报，以及香港大学泛珠三角研究项目收录的《汕头市统计年鉴2005》节选。1981-1999 年新增年度帧使用公开整理的广东各市 GDP 排行页补齐；其中 1981-1984 年广州值用广州历年 GDP 表补充，佛山、肇庆在 1981-1989 年因逐年公开值缺失，使用 1980 与 1990 锚点做几何插值。
sourceNoteEn: Early 1978-2005 frames mainly use the NBS China City Statistical Yearbook table for major Pearl River Delta cities. That table does not cover all 21 Guangdong prefecture-level cities, so some non-PRD cities enter from the Guangdong Statistics Bureau city-level annual data starting in 2010. Early Shantou points are supplemented from Guangdong Statistics Bureau special-zone material, the Shantou Statistics Bureau 2005 communique, and a Shantou Statistical Yearbook 2005 excerpt archived by the University of Hong Kong Pan-PRD project. The new 1981-1999 annual frames use public compiled Guangdong city GDP ranking pages where available; Guangzhou 1981-1984 is supplemented from a Guangzhou historical GDP table, while Foshan and Zhaoqing use geometric interpolation between the 1980 and 1990 anchor frames for 1981-1989 where annual public values were unavailable.
